title: AI Model Registry Artifact
description: Schema for artifacts stored in the ai-model-registry manifest

format.description: Artifact format, inferred from filename extension

filename.description: Filename on disk within the registry directory

sha256.description: SHA-256 digest of the artifact file

source.description: Origin URL or identifier (e.g. Hugging Face repo)

promoted_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the artifact was promoted

state.description: Trust state — only 'trusted' artifacts can be loaded at runtime

scan_results.description: Results from security scanners (e.g. modelscan, gguf-guard)

scanner_versions.description: Versions of scanners used during quarantine

policy_version.description: Version of the promotion policy applied

source_revision.description: Source revision (e.g. Hugging Face commit hash)

gguf_guard_fingerprint.description: Per-tensor fingerprint from gguf-guard (GGUF files only)

gguf_guard_manifest.description: Path to the gguf-guard integrity manifest file
